questions.question: The distribution of population in India is:

What is the percentage of urban population in India according to Census 2011?
As per the Census of India data, the overall population density of India in 2011 was:

Which of the following best explains why adult literacy varies significantly across Indian states?
Population density is calculated as:
questions.option_1: number of persons living per unit area
questions.option_2: average number of people per family
questions.option_3: total number of people in a country
questions.option_4: number of children born per year

questions.question: Unemployment reflects the inability of the economy to provide jobs to those willing to work. Which organisation conducts the Periodic Labour Force Survey (PLFS) in India?
What was the major demographic feature of India at the time of independence?
questions.option_2: High death rate and infant mortality
